title: Next.js Dashboard Template
description: Next.js Dashboard Template is a premium admin dashboard UI kit built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It ships pre-built analytics, CRM, e-commerce, and settings modules on top of a shared layout system, reusable charts (Recharts), interactive maps, and a full authentication flow - designed to be sold as a ready-to-use dashboard template.
body:
## Problem

Teams building internal tools or SaaS admin panels spend weeks assembling the same pieces from scratch - layout shell, navigation, charts, tables, forms, auth screens - before they can start on actual product features.

## Solution

Next.js Dashboard Template is a complete admin dashboard UI kit built with Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It provides a shared layout system with pre-built dashboard, analytics, CRM, e-commerce, forms, tables, widgets, and settings modules, plus a full authentication flow - ready to drop into a new product and customize.

## Key Features

- **Multiple Dashboard Modules: **Dashboard, analytics, CRM, e-commerce, admin, forms, tables, and widgets pages ship out of the box, each following a consistent design language.
- **Data Visualization: **Recharts-based charts and react-simple-maps power analytics widgets and geographic data views.
- **Reusable Component System: **Layout, shared, and UI component folders are cleanly separated so new pages can be assembled from existing building blocks.
- **Authentication Screens: **Login, register, and account-flow pages are included as a ready-to-wire auth module.
- **Dark/Light Theming: **Built on next-themes with Tailwind CSS v4 tokens for consistent theming across every module.

## Outcome / Results

- **Reusable Product: **Packaged as a standalone template that can be licensed and reused across multiple client/admin-panel projects instead of being rebuilt each time.
- **Consistent UX Across Modules: **A shared layout and component system keeps 8+ distinct dashboard sections visually and behaviorally consistent.

## Key Takeaways / Learnings

- **Template Architecture: **Learned to structure a component library generically enough to support many different dashboard domains (CRM, e-commerce, analytics) without forking code per module.
- **Chart/Map Integration: **Gained experience wiring Recharts and react-simple-maps into a reusable, theme-aware widget system.

title: UI Component Library
description: UI Component Library is a website-only, copy-paste UI component library built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Users browse categorized sections (hero, pricing, CTA, navbar, footer, FAQ, testimonials, and more), preview them live, and copy self-contained, dependency-free source code straight into their own projects — no CLI or npm install required. The library supports free and pro (paid) component tiers.
body:
## Problem

Developers repeatedly rebuild the same SaaS landing page sections — heroes, pricing tables, CTAs, navbars, footers, FAQs, testimonials — from scratch on every project, or hunt through inconsistent component libraries that require heavy setup, CLIs, or npm installs before a single component can be used.

## Solution

UI Component Library is a website-only, copy-paste UI component library built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Every section is browsable by category, previewable live in the browser, and ships as self-contained, dependency-free source code that can be pasted directly into any project — no CLI, no install step, no configuration.

## Key Features

- **Live Component Previews: **Every section renders live in the browser before copying, so developers can see exactly how it looks and behaves.
- **Categorized Browsing: **Components are organized into hero, pricing, CTA, navbar, footer, FAQ, testimonial, and more, making it fast to find the right section.
- **Copy-Paste Source Code: **Each component ships as dependency-free, self-contained code — no package installs or CLI setup required.
- **Free & Pro Tiers: **A free tier covers core components, while a paid Pro tier unlocks the full library for teams that need more coverage.

## Outcome / Results

- **Faster Prototyping: **Reduced the time to assemble a full SaaS landing page from hours to minutes by removing the need to build sections from scratch.
- **Zero-Dependency Adoption: **Because components are dependency-free, they drop into any Next.js + Tailwind project without version conflicts.

## Key Takeaways / Learnings

- **Component API Design: **Learned how to design components that stay flexible and dependency-free while still looking production-ready out of the box.
- **Content-Driven Architecture: **Built a scalable pattern for organizing, previewing, and gating large numbers of UI variants behind free/pro access.

title: Survey Management System
description: Feedback Hub is a full-stack SaaS platform for creating feedback forms, sharing them via public links, and analyzing responses in real-time. It replaces tools like Google Forms and Typeform with a modern, team-oriented experience featuring rich analytics, workspace management, and billing/subscription support.
body:
## Problem

Teams collecting feedback often rely on generic form tools like Google Forms or Typeform, which lack team-oriented workspaces, rich analytics, and built-in billing — forcing them to stitch together multiple tools just to create, share, and analyze feedback at scale.

## Solution

Feedback Hub is a full-stack SaaS platform for creating feedback forms, sharing them via public links, and analyzing responses in real time. It replaces point solutions with a single modern, team-oriented experience that includes rich analytics, workspace management, and subscription billing.

## Key Features

- **Public Feedback Forms: **Users create feedback forms and share them via public links, no account required for respondents.
- **Real-Time Analytics: **Responses are analyzed as they arrive, giving teams live visibility into feedback trends instead of static exports.
- **Workspace Management: **Teams organize forms and responses inside shared workspaces built for collaboration.
- **Billing & Subscriptions: **Built-in subscription management supports monetizing the platform directly.

## Outcome / Results

- **Consolidated Workflow: **Replaced the need for separate form, analytics, and billing tools with a single connected platform.
- **Faster Feedback Loops: **Real-time analytics let teams react to feedback trends immediately instead of waiting on manual exports.

## Key Takeaways / Learnings

- **Full-Stack SaaS Architecture: **Gained experience building a complete SaaS product end-to-end, from form builder to billing.
- **Real-Time Data Pipelines: **Learned to structure real-time analytics so response data updates live without manual refreshes.

title: Education Website
description: Education Website is a full-stack education platform for classes 9–12 and Virtual University students, providing books, notes, MCQs, past papers, pairing schemes, and online tests. It runs as a monorepo of 7 Next.js portals (auth, public site, super-admin, admin, student, teacher, parent) backed by a single Express/tRPC API, with strict role-based access control and real-time features via Socket.IO.
body:
## Problem

Students preparing for classes 9-12 board exams and Virtual University coursework rely on scattered resources - photocopied notes, disconnected MCQ banks, and separate portals for teachers, parents, and administrators - with no single platform tying content, testing, and role-based access together.

## Solution

Education Website is a monorepo education platform built around a strict content hierarchy (Class -> Book -> Chapter -> Heading -> SubHeading -> MCQ). It ships 7 role-locked Next.js portals - auth, public web, super-admin, admin, student, teacher, and parent - all served by a single Express 5 + tRPC monolith API, so every portal shares one type-safe backend, one MongoDB database, and one Redis cache.

## Key Features

- **Role-Based Portals: **Each of the 7 portals is locked to a specific role (SuperAdmin, Admin, Teacher, Student, Parent), with server-verified redirects if a user tries to access the wrong portal.
- **End-to-End Type Safety: **tRPC over HTTP connects every frontend to the API with fully typed queries and mutations, eliminating REST contract drift.
- **Structured Content Model: **Books, chapters, headings, MCQs, past papers, pairing schemes, and date sheets are organized in a consistent hierarchy across Boards and Institutions.
- **Real-Time Features: **Socket.IO powers live updates across portals (e.g. test/session state) without polling.
- **Shared Design System: **A custom internal component library (built via Rollup) keeps all 7 apps visually and behaviorally consistent.

## Outcome / Results

- **Unified Platform: **Replaced the need for separate tools/spreadsheets per role with one coherent system covering content delivery, testing, and administration.
- **Maintainable Monolith: **A single Express process with one MongoDB/Redis pair kept development and deployment simple while still serving 7 independent frontends.

## Key Takeaways / Learnings

- **Nx Monorepo at Scale: **Learned to structure and cache builds for a large multi-app, multi-package Nx workspace without cross-app coupling.
- **Role-Based Access Control: **Designed port/portal-level RBAC with server-side verification on every request rather than trusting client-side route guards.

title: Treepost AI
description: Treepost AI is a Canadian marketplace platform that connects homeowners with certified tree service contractors through AI-powered price estimates, real-time bidding, secure payments, and direct communication. The platform simplifies the process of finding trusted contractors by replacing manual quote requests with instant AI estimates, verified professionals, and a transparent bidding system.
body:
## Problem

Homeowners struggled to find trusted tree contractors and had no way to compare fair pricing before hiring. Getting quotes meant contacting multiple contractors manually — slow, inconsistent, and unreliable. Unverified contractors, payment disputes, and zero transparency made the whole experience frustrating for both sides.

## Solution

Treepost AI built a digital marketplace that replaces the entire offline process. Homeowners post once and get instant AI-powered price estimates, browse verified contractors, and pay securely — all in one place. Contractors get qualified local leads, a bidding system, and real-time messaging without chasing clients.

## Key Features

- **AI-Powered Price Estimates: **Homeowners receive instant project estimates using AI with up to 95% pricing accuracy before reviewing contractor bids.
- **Job Posting System: **Users can post jobs with detailed descriptions, photos, and videos to help contractors assess project scope accurately.
- **Contractor Verification: **Contractors must submit licenses, insurance, and WSIB documentation before approval, ensuring a trusted service network.
- **Competitive Bidding Platform: **Verified contractors browse available jobs and submit bids, allowing homeowners to compare pricing and choose the best fit.
- **Real-Time Messaging:** Built-in messaging enables direct communication between homeowners and contractors for faster decisions and better coordination.
- **Protected Payment System: **Secure payment handling protects both parties by ensuring safe transactions throughout the project lifecycle.
- **Admin Dashboard: **Admins manage users, contractor approvals, analytics, platform reports, and AI feedback improvements from a centralized dashboard.

## Outcome / Results

- **95% AI Estimate Accuracy: **The pricing engine provided highly accurate instant estimates, reducing uncertainty before contractor selection.
- **15,000+ Community Members: **The platform successfully built a strong network of homeowners and verified contractors across the Canadian market.
- **98% Customer Satisfaction Rate: **Transparent pricing, verified professionals, and secure workflows significantly improved user trust and satisfaction.
- **100% Verified Contractor Network: **Strict contractor verification ensured all service providers met professional and legal compliance standards.
- **Faster Hiring Workflow:** AI estimates and bidding reduced the time required to find and hire trusted contractors compared to traditional manual processes.

## Key Takeaways / Learnings

- **Advanced React Architecture: **Improved frontend scalability by managing complex multi-role dashboards and reusable component systems.
- **Pixel-Perfect UI Development: **Strengthened expertise in building highly polished responsive interfaces across all device sizes.
- **Real-Time System Design: **Learned how to structure real-time messaging and notifications for seamless user communication.
- **Complex State Management: **Handled bidding workflows, contractor verification states, and AI estimate feedback flows efficiently.
- **AI + User Feedback Loops: **Gained experience integrating AI-generated estimates with user feedback systems for continuous platform improvement.
- **Role-Based Frontend Access: **Built secure and intuitive interfaces for homeowners, contractors, and admins with different access levels.

title: Nova Exordium
description: Nova Exordium is an all-in-one platform designed to streamline project management and accelerate customer onboarding. It offers real-time dashboards, customizable templates, smart notifications, and collaborative tools to enhance team productivity and client engagement.
body:
## Problem

Teams managing multiple client projects often struggle with scattered onboarding steps, delayed status visibility, and disconnected communication tools — slowing down both project delivery and the first impression new clients get during onboarding.

## Solution

Nova Exordium is an all-in-one platform designed to streamline project management and accelerate customer onboarding. It offers real-time dashboards, customizable templates, smart notifications, and collaborative tools that keep teams and clients aligned from day one.

## Key Features

- **Real-Time Dashboards: **Project status and progress update live, giving teams and clients shared visibility without manual status updates.
- **Customizable Templates: **Onboarding and project templates can be tailored per client, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Smart Notifications: **Automated notifications keep team members and clients informed of key milestones and changes.
- **Real-Time Messaging: **Built-in messaging (Socket.IO) enables direct communication without leaving the platform.

## Outcome / Results

- **Faster Client Onboarding: **Customizable templates and automated notifications reduced the manual steps needed to onboard a new client.
- **Improved Team Productivity: **Centralized dashboards and messaging cut down on status-update overhead across the team.

## Key Takeaways / Learnings

- **Real-Time System Design: **Learned to structure Socket.IO-based real-time updates across dashboards and messaging simultaneously.
- **Multi-Role Collaboration Tools: **Built collaborative features that stay coherent across different team and client roles.

title: DTF Printing Customer Portal
description: Urban DTF Customer Portal is a full-stack web application built for URBAN DTF & T-SHIRTS, a custom DTF printing business. The platform allows customers to upload designs, configure garment orders, make secure payments, and track production progress in real time. It helps streamline order management, reduce manual communication, and improve customer experience by transforming traditional printing operations into a fully digital workflow.
body:
## Problem

URBAN DTF & T-SHIRTS relied on manual communication to collect designs, configure garment orders, and track production — a slow, error-prone process that made it hard to scale order volume or give customers visibility into their order status.

## Solution

Urban DTF Customer Portal is a full-stack web application that lets customers upload designs, configure garment orders, make secure payments, and track production progress in real time — transforming a manual printing workflow into a fully digital, self-service experience.

## Key Features

- **Design Upload & Order Configuration: **Customers upload designs and configure garment orders directly, replacing back-and-forth manual requests.
- **Secure Payments: **Stripe-powered checkout handles order payments securely within the portal.
- **Real-Time Production Tracking: **Socket.IO-driven updates let customers track order progress live instead of requesting status manually.
- **Order Management Dashboard: **Staff manage incoming orders, production stages, and customer communication from a centralized dashboard.

## Outcome / Results

- **Reduced Manual Communication: **Digitizing design uploads and order configuration cut down on manual back-and-forth with customers.
- **Streamlined Order Management: **Centralized order and production tracking made it easier to manage higher order volume.

## Key Takeaways / Learnings

- **Real-Time Order Tracking: **Learned to build real-time production tracking using Socket.IO on top of a Prisma/PostgreSQL backend.
- **Payment Integration at Scale: **Gained experience integrating Stripe for a production order-to-payment workflow.

title: Insight Carrier
description: Insight Carrier is a B2B SaaS platform built for insurance agents, brokers, and carriers to access qualified trucking leads, company safety profiles, and policy renewal opportunities. The platform helps insurance professionals reduce manual research time, identify high-value prospects faster, and improve client retention using real-time motor carrier data.
body:
## Problem

Insurance agents, brokers, and carriers spend significant time manually researching trucking companies to find qualified leads, verify safety profiles, and identify policy renewal opportunities — slowing down prospecting and hurting client retention.

## Solution

Insight Carrier is a B2B SaaS platform that gives insurance professionals direct access to qualified trucking leads, company safety profiles, and policy renewal opportunities, using real-time motor carrier data to replace manual research.

## Key Features

- **Qualified Lead Access: **Surfaces trucking leads that match an agent or broker’s target criteria, cutting down manual prospecting.
- **Safety Profile Lookups: **Provides company safety profiles sourced from real-time motor carrier data.
- **Renewal Opportunity Tracking: **Flags policy renewal opportunities so agents can act before a client’s policy lapses.
- **Real-Time Carrier Data: **Backend integrates live motor carrier data instead of relying on stale, manually updated records.

## Outcome / Results

- **Reduced Manual Research Time: **Real-time carrier data lookups replaced hours of manual research per prospect.
- **Improved Client Retention: **Proactive renewal tracking helped agents reach clients before policies lapsed.

## Key Takeaways / Learnings

- **Backend-Heavy SaaS Design: **Focused on backend architecture for ingesting and serving real-time third-party carrier data reliably.
- **Domain-Specific Data Modeling: **Learned to model insurance/trucking domain data (safety profiles, renewals) in MongoDB.

title: BRIEFS Coach
description: B.R.I.E.F.S. Coach is an AI-powered mental coaching platform that helps users record voice-based emotional “vents” and receive instant AI-generated coaching guidance with relevant YouTube video recommendations. The platform enables organizations and practitioners to provide scalable mental wellness support by combining voice recording, GPT-4 coaching responses, coach management, and subscription-based team access.
body:
## Problem

People experiencing emotional stress often don’t have immediate access to a coach or therapist, and typing out feelings during a difficult moment can be harder than simply speaking them — leaving a gap between needing support and being able to express it.

## Solution

B.R.I.E.F.S. Coach is an AI-powered mental coaching platform that lets users record voice-based emotional "vents" and receive instant AI-generated coaching guidance, paired with relevant YouTube video recommendations, enabling organizations to offer scalable mental wellness support.

## Key Features

- **Voice-Based Venting: **Users record how they’re feeling by voice instead of typing, lowering the barrier to expressing emotion.
- **AI Coaching Responses: **GPT-4 generates instant, relevant coaching guidance based on the recorded vent.
- **Curated Video Recommendations: **Relevant YouTube videos are recommended alongside AI guidance for further support.
- **Coach & Subscription Management: **Organizations and practitioners manage coaches and offer the platform via subscription-based team access.

## Outcome / Results

- **Scalable Wellness Support: **Enabled organizations to offer mental wellness support without needing a 1:1 coach available at all times.
- **Lower Barrier to Support: **Voice-based input made it easier for users to express emotions compared to text-only journaling tools.

## Key Takeaways / Learnings

- **AI Prompt & Response Design: **Learned to design GPT-4 prompts that produce empathetic, actionable coaching responses from raw voice input.
- **Voice-to-Insight Pipelines: **Gained experience building a pipeline from voice recording to transcription to AI-generated guidance.

title: Real Estate Media Pricing Calculator
description: Real Estate Media Pricing Calculator is a web-based pricing platform that helps real estate media professionals generate accurate, market-based pricing recommendations for photography, videography, drone services, floor plans, virtual staging, and twilight photography across the United States. The platform uses verified market data from 2,695 real estate media businesses to provide location-specific pricing ranges with confidence ratings, helping professionals price services competitively and confidently.
body:
## Problem

Real estate media professionals — photographers, videographers, drone operators — often price their services by guesswork or outdated rate cards, making it hard to stay competitive without either undercharging or losing bids on price.

## Solution

Real Estate Media Pricing Calculator is a web-based pricing platform that generates accurate, market-based pricing recommendations for photography, videography, drone services, floor plans, virtual staging, and twilight photography, using verified market data from 2,695 real estate media businesses across the United States.

## Key Features

- **Location-Specific Pricing: **Generates pricing ranges tailored to the professional’s specific market location.
- **Multi-Service Coverage: **Covers photography, videography, drone services, floor plans, virtual staging, and twilight photography in one calculator.
- **Confidence Ratings: **Each pricing recommendation includes a confidence rating based on the underlying market data.
- **Verified Market Dataset: **Built on market data from 2,695 real estate media businesses rather than static or self-reported rate cards.

## Outcome / Results

- **More Competitive Pricing: **Helped professionals price services with market-backed confidence instead of guesswork.
- **Reduced Under/Overpricing: **Location-specific ranges reduced the risk of pricing too high to win bids or too low to be profitable.

## Key Takeaways / Learnings

- **Data-Driven Pricing Models: **Learned to translate a large verified dataset into simple, actionable pricing ranges for end users.
- **Confidence-Rated Recommendations: **Gained experience presenting statistical confidence in a way non-technical users can trust and act on.

relatedProjects.description: B.R.I.E.F.S. Coach is an AI-powered mental coaching platform that helps users record voice-based emotional “vents” and receive instant AI-generated coaching guidance with relevant YouTube video recommendations. The platform enables organizations and practitioners to provide scalable mental wellness support by combining voice recording, GPT-4 coaching responses, coach management, and subscription-based team access.

title: Extra Scrub
description: Extra Scrub Cleaning Services Website is a professional multi-page business website built for a cleaning company based in London. The platform helps customers explore residential and commercial cleaning services, request custom quotes, book appointments online, and contact the team easily. The goal was to create a modern, mobile-friendly digital presence that improves customer trust, simplifies service discovery, and increases booking conversions.
body:
## Problem

Extra Scrub, a cleaning company based in London, needed a professional online presence — without one, customers had no easy way to explore services, request quotes, or book appointments, which limited trust and booking conversions.

## Solution

Extra Scrub Cleaning Services Website is a professional multi-page business website that lets customers explore residential and commercial cleaning services, request custom quotes, book appointments online, and contact the team easily, all through a modern, mobile-friendly design.

## Key Features

- **Service Exploration: **Customers browse residential and commercial cleaning services in a clear, organized layout.
- **Custom Quote Requests: **A quote request flow lets customers describe their needs and get a tailored response.
- **Online Appointment Booking: **Customers book appointments directly through the site instead of calling or emailing.
- **Mobile-Friendly Design: **The site is fully responsive, built for customers browsing and booking from their phones.

## Outcome / Results

- **Increased Booking Conversions: **A modern, trustworthy digital presence made it easier for visitors to convert into booked appointments.
- **Simplified Service Discovery: **Clear service categorization reduced confusion about what Extra Scrub offers.

## Key Takeaways / Learnings

- **Conversion-Focused Web Design: **Learned to structure a small business site around clear calls-to-action for quotes and bookings.
- **Mobile-First Development: **Reinforced building fully responsive layouts for a primarily mobile customer base.

relatedProjects.title: Nova Exordium
relatedProjects.description: Nova Exordium is an all-in-one platform designed to streamline project management and accelerate customer onboarding. It offers real-time dashboards, customizable templates, smart notifications, and collaborative tools to enhance team productivity and client engagement.

relatedProjects.title: Insight Carrier
relatedProjects.description: Insight Carrier is a B2B SaaS platform built for insurance agents, brokers, and carriers to access qualified trucking leads, company safety profiles, and policy renewal opportunities. The platform helps insurance professionals reduce manual research time, identify high-value prospects faster, and improve client retention using real-time motor carrier data.

relatedProjects.title: DTF Printing Customer Portal
relatedProjects.description: Urban DTF Customer Portal is a full-stack web application built for URBAN DTF & T-SHIRTS, a custom DTF printing business. The platform allows customers to upload designs, configure garment orders, make secure payments, and track production progress in real time. It helps streamline order management, reduce manual communication, and improve customer experience by transforming traditional printing operations into a fully digital workflow.
